steps.title: Identify the grammatical function
steps.content: The blank must be a possessive word modifying narrative. The antecedent noun is poem, which is singular.

steps.title: Apply the singular possessive form
steps.content: Its is the singular possessive adjective that agrees with poem. The other choices are either plural (their) or contractions that do not express possession (they're and it's). That matches choice D — D is correct.
